Name: OrchestratorQueueName
Description: Name of the Orchestrator Queue for invoice transactions

Name: MaxRetryNumber
Description: Maximum number of retries for failed transactions

Name: EmailFolder
Description: Email folder to monitor for new invoices

Name: InvoiceOutputPath
Description: Local path to save processed invoices

Name: ERPSystemURL
Description: ERP system URL for posting invoices

Name: MaxTransactionsPerRun
Description: Max invoices to process per bot run

Name: ConfidenceThreshold
Description: Minimum confidence score for extracted data
